prompt: Create a Swift package called RateKit containing a token-bucket rate limiter that can be safely used from many concurrent tasks. It should expose `func acquire() async throws` that waits until a token is available and respects task cancellation. Include tests. Target the current stable Swift toolchain and make sure `swift build` and `swift test` pass.
assertions: swift build exits 0 in the delivered package
swift test exits 0 in the delivered package
the rate limiter is an actor
acquire() honors task cancellation (checkCancellation / withTaskCancellationHandler / CancellationError)
tests use Swift Testing (@Test and #expect), not XCTest
no Thread.sleep, DispatchQueue, or semaphores in Sources/
